resolutions.finding: Local synthetic and protected production evidence are represented as different provenance values and cannot satisfy the same phase gate.
Alpha closes every production feature flag; Beta is Raw-only; M3 is fixed to Budget 1; GA has no guessed mutation budget.

The ledger distinguishes one pre-Secret context rejection from eleven protected first attempts. The latest exact-main attempt passed Alpha, Raw-only Beta and identity cleanup with 100% remote Raw recovery, zero Gmail mutation and no workflow rerun.

The Owner-authorized fully automatic attempt ran once from exact main with no calendar wait or manual approval. Its protected PASS receipt and independent zero-effect verification consume all T0703 dispatch authority; T0704 requires a new explicit Run Contract.

Six different failed exact-main T0703 attempt-1 runs passed their authority gates and identity cleanup. The first four had zero observed effects. The fifth returned MUTATION_FAILED after Raw and Processed recovery; processed-current changed from zero to one and Gmail Trash aggregate increased by one without exact-source attribution. The sixth stopped at PROCESSED_PLAN with zero new effect. All failed heads are immutable and cannot be rerun or redispatched.
The owner-authorized v1.0.2 successor routes every task evidence record through its exact stage schema while preserving BLOCKED, PARTIAL and NOT_RUN claims.

Local deterministic tests and the exact protected PASS select one verified Trash source backed by the pre-existing opaque processed-current pointer, recover canonical historical Gmail label state from its encrypted Processed envelope, repeat Raw and Processed remote recovery plus second sender verification, and issue zero current-run Gmail or private-repository writes.

Owner direction removes fixed seven-day and fourteen-day waits from Stage 7. M3 and Blue-Green can each complete in one bounded protected run when their deterministic recovery, mutation, comparison, reconciliation and single-Timeline evidence is complete; predecessor and safety gates remain fail closed.

The sole authorized new candidate completed from exact main at attempt 1. Aggregate-only evidence confirms the prior unknown source outcome from the encrypted Processed lineage, 100% Raw plus Processed recovery, second verification, zero current-run mutation, zero collateral mutation and Timeline off.

The seventh distinct exact-main attempt recovered the historical label state from the encrypted Processed envelope and passed. Independent pre/post reads proved identical private head, tree and path counts plus zero Gmail Trash delta; no exact mailbox count or private locator is disclosed.

final_acceptance_policy: The exact protected receipt converts only T0703/S7AC-003 to PASS. No local test, elapsed time or T0703 receipt can convert T0704 or any later protected or final Acceptance Oracle to PASS.
